title: GlideFast Consulting Unveils AgileGenius: AI-Powered Agile Project Management Integration to Transform ServiceNow Experience
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--GlideFast Consulting, an Elite ServiceNow Partner and ASGN brand, is proud to announce the launch of AgileGenius, a groundbreaking initiative that leverages the power of artificial intelligence (AI) to revolutionize Agile project management. AgileGenius introduces an advanced integration that automates key aspects of Agile project setup, work allocation, requirement linkage, SCRUM task creation, and more, empowering organizations to optimize their ServiceNow experience.

title: Cognizant and ServiceNow Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Adoption of AI-driven Automation
text: Cognizant's industry expertise and solutions, including the AI-led Cognizant Neuro®️ suite of platforms, integrated with ServiceNow's intelligent platform for end-to-end digital transformation, are expected to accelerate the path toward building a combined $1 billion business Cognizant is ServiceNow's lead launch partner for end-to-end observability solutions for cloud applications across industries Cognizant's newly formed internal ServiceNow Business Group will bring to market AI-powered, integrated offerings designed to deliver next-generation, cost-optimized solutions for clients  TEANECK, N.J. and SANTA CLARA, Calif.

title: Tanium Unveils Total Experience for ServiceNow
text: KIRKLAND, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tanium, the industry's only provider of converged endpoint management (XEM), announced today the launch of Tanium Total Experience (TX) for ServiceNow. Tanium has integrated its industry-leading XEM platform with the ServiceNow platform to bring unparalleled visibility, real-time data, and proactive remediation to organizations looking to improve IT staff, employee, and customer experiences. title: NewRocket Recognized as the 2023 ServiceNow Worldwide Customer Workflow Partner of the Year
text: VISTA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NewRocket, the go-to ServiceNow guide for global enterprise leaders, has been named the 2023 ServiceNow Worldwide Customer Workflow Partner of the Year. The award, presented at the ServiceNow Partner Awards earlier this month, recognizes NewRocket for its performance in expanding the ServiceNow Customer Service Management practice.
